creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From within <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=7453645f2a9411a3f9d982b768bcc323f41cf906> (2016-10-17): 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/diff/sys/modules/rtwnfw/Makefile.inc?id=7453645f2a9411a3f9d982b768bcc323f41cf906> in Makefile.inc the former requirement became a comment: 

# FIRMWARE_LICENSE=	realtek

Possibly contrary to this, rtwnfw(4) states: 

>      For the loaded firmware to be enabled for use the license at
>      /usr/share/doc/legal/realtek.LICENSE must be agreed to by 
>      adding the following line to loader.conf(5):
> 
> 	   legal.realtek.license_ack=1

From <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/551385>: 

> … firmware gets loaded (with or without legal.realtek.license_ack=1 
> in loader.conf(5), …
